query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
Research complete. Here is the summary of findings on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds in June–July 2026:

**Key takeaway:** The only *fresh private equity round* in the June–July 2026 window across the three companies is **Mistral AI's rumored ~€3B raise at a ~€20B valuation** (reported by Bloomberg on June 12, 2026, still early-stage with no confirmed close). OpenAI and Anthropic both closed their headline mega-rounds before June 2026.

- **OpenAI:** Closed a record **$122B round at an $852B valuation** (March 31, 2026). No new equity round in June–July; activity centers on **SoftBank's ~$40B bridge loan** and **IPO prep** (confidential S-1 filed May 2026, Q4 2026 target).
- **Anthropic:** Closed **$65B Series H at a $965B valuation** (May 28, 2026) — the world's most valuable AI company. No new round in June–July 2026; positioned for an eventual IPO. (Prior Series G: $30B at $380B, Feb 2026.)
- **Mistral AI:** **Active/imminent round** — early-stage talks for **~€3B (~$3.5B) at ~€20B (~$23B)**, nearly doubling its prior €11.7B valuation (Series C led by ASML, Sept 2025). Also closed an $830M debt round in March 2026.

I've provided the full structured output with all data points and sources. Note: per my mandate, I report the current trajectory/status of these rounds but do not forecast whether or when they will close.

sources.title: OpenAI closes record-breaking $122 billion funding round as anticipation builds for IPO
sources.snippet: OpenAI on Tuesday announced it closed a record-breaking funding round at a post-money valuation of $852 billion; round totaled $122 billion, up from $110 billion.

sources.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
sources.snippet: SoftBank co-led the round alongside Andreessen Horowitz, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and T. Rowe Price; Amazon, Nvidia, Microsoft participating; ~$3B from retail.

sources.title: OpenAI Stock IPO: Valuation, Timeline and Investment Options
sources.snippet: OpenAI confidentially filed an S-1 with the SEC on May 22, 2026; Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading, targeting a public debut as soon as Q4 2026.

sources.title: Eight banks back SoftBank's $40B OpenAI bridge loan ahead of expected IPO
sources.snippet: Eight banks agreed to act as sub-underwriters for SoftBank's $40 billion bridge loan, its largest dollar-denominated loan ever.

sources.title: AI funding: the real turning point
sources.snippet: July 2, 2026 analysis: SoftBank faced difficulties securing financing; lenders now evaluating deals with more traditional risk/collateral/valuation criteria.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in Series H led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
sources.snippet: Series H co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia, Capital Group, Coatue, D1; possibly its last private raise before public markets.

sources.title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation
sources.snippet: Anthropic announced a $65 billion Series H financing at a $965 billion valuation, becoming the most valuable AI company in Silicon Valley.

sources.title: Anthropic's $900 Billion Funding Round Set To Surpass OpenAI
sources.snippet: On April 30, Bloomberg reported a ~$50 billion raise at a valuation north of $900 billion, which would make Anthropic the most valuable AI company.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $30 billion in Series G funding at $380 billion post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Series G of $30 billion led by GIC and Coatue, valuing Anthropic at $380 billion post-money (February 2026).

sources.title: Anthropic's Blockbuster Raise Sends Private Equity Coinvestments Soaring
sources.snippet: July 2026: LP coinvestments totaled $198 billion Jan 1–June 25, 2026, driven by AI rounds led by companies such as Anthropic.

sources.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
sources.snippet: French AI lab Mistral in early discussions to raise ~€3 billion ($3.5B) at ~€20 billion valuation, nearly double its €11.7 billion valuation.

sources.snippet: Mistral AI in funding talks at about €20 billion valuation (reported June 12, 2026).

sources.snippet: Discussions in early stages; terms could change, valuation figures potentially rising based on investor interest.

sources.title: How Much Did Mistral AI Raise? Funding & Key Investors
sources.snippet: Latest funding a Debt Financing round announced March 30, 2026, raising $830 million from a consortium of seven banks.

sources.title: Mistral AI - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
sources.snippet: Mistral AI has raised ~$3.05B over 8 rounds; largest was Series C for $2B in Sep 2025.

sources.title: OpenAI revenue, valuation & funding | Sacra
sources.snippet: OpenAI valuation $852B (2026), funding $178B, estimated $25B annualized revenue (Feb 2026).

key_facts: OpenAI closed a record $122 billion funding round at an $852 billion post-money valuation, announced March 31, 2026 (co-led by SoftBank, a16z, D.E. Shaw, MGX, TPG, T. Rowe Price; Amazon, Nvidia, Microsoft participating; ~$3B from retail).
OpenAI confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC (reported May 22 / June 8, 2026); Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley leading, targeting a public debut as soon as Q4 2026.

OpenAI's active June–July 2026 financing is SoftBank's ~$40 billion bridge loan (its largest-ever dollar-denominated loan) with eight banks as sub-underwriters (HSBC, BNP Paribas, Intesa Sanpaolo, others) — not a new equity round.

Anthropic closed a $65 billion Series H at a $965 billion post-money valuation, announced May 28, 2026, making it the most valuable AI company (surpassing OpenAI); co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia.
Anthropic's Series H was reported in progress from ~April 30, 2026 (initially ~$50B at >$900B) and grew to $65B/$965B by close; described as possibly its last private raise before an IPO.
Anthropic's prior 2026 round was Series G: $30 billion at $380 billion post-money (February 2026, led by GIC and Coatue).
No new Anthropic funding round was announced in June–July 2026; July coverage references the already-closed Series H.
Mistral AI is in early-stage talks (reported June 12, 2026 by Bloomberg) to raise ~€3 billion (~$3.5B) at a ~€20 billion (~$23B) valuation — nearly double its prior €11.7B valuation.
Mistral's round was early-stage with no confirmed close date or disclosed new investors; valuation could rise based on investor demand.
Mistral's prior valuation of €11.7 billion came from a Series C (€1.7–2B) led by ASML in September 2025; it also closed an $830M debt financing on March 30, 2026 for data-center expansion.
The only fresh private equity round in the June–July 2026 window across the three companies is Mistral AI's rumored ~€3B / ~€20B raise.
Early-July 2026 commentary notes lenders/investors applying more traditional risk, collateral, and valuation criteria to AI financing, complicating SoftBank's OpenAI financing.
